title: Expectations of a rate cut boost sentiment
section_path: Expectations of a rate cut boost sentiment
section_path_text: Expectations of a rate cut boost sentiment
summary:
Main
A risk-on tone across markets boosted sentiment across commodities. This was triggered by rising expectations of an imminent rate cut by the Fed. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Screenshot 2024-08-19 10.57.10.png | assets/2024-08-19_qdyjyp77rgbmivrn9win3hdw08q6hz_img_screenshot2024-08-19105710_079fe0cc7f7d.png

Market Commentary
Copper recorded its first weekly gain since early July as fears of a hard economic landing in the US eased.

children.title: Main
children.summary: A risk-on tone across markets boosted sentiment across commodities. This was triggered by rising expectations of an imminent rate cut by the Fed.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Copper recorded its first weekly gain since early July as fears of a hard economic landing in the US eased. A combination of robust US jobs data and better than expected retail sales triggered a risk-on tone across markets.

children.title: Chart of the Day
children.summary:
House prices in China's 70 largest cities continue to weaken amid a lack of buying from consumers
